findings.evidence: grep found DeckFiberAction only in its own file; roadmap/TauCetiRoadmap/UniversalCovers/README.md:85 lists only Deck as Subgroup + MulAction E
findings.fix: make definition and instances private (or move to internal file) until a later roadmap stage consumes them
findings.issue: fiberHomeomorphMonoidHom and the two fibre instances are public surface not required by named target

findings.evidence: no other .lean imports DeckFiberAction; Deck.lean only exports fiberHomeomorph

summary: PR adds public file DeckFiberAction.lean exposing fiberHomeomorphMonoidHom, instFiberMulAction and instFiberContinuousConstSMul for fibres; roadmap Stage 0.4 only asks for Deck subgroup plus inherited action on E.
